ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "priority_class" INTEGER /* Priority class of the application (foreign key to priority_classes) */,
  "handles" INTEGER /* Number of handles opened by the application */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Current file version of the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the application instance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the application instance (if applicable) */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the application is running (foreign key to environments) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the application (foreign key to user_accounts) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_priority_class FOREIGN KEY ("priority_class") REFERENCES priority_classes ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priority_classes" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority class */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority class (e.g., Normal, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the priority class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the version belongs to */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version number of the application file */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the file version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file version (foreign key to user_accounts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application whose status is being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status (foreign key to user_accounts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, support) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the application was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric log */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being monitored */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage of the application */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in MB of the application */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage in MB of the application */,
  "network_usage" REAL /* Network usage in MB of the application */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the application in milliseconds */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of active sessions for the application */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Production, Staging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Performance, Security) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Critical, Warning, Info) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert (foreign key to user_accounts) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being updated */,
  "old_version" TEXT /* Previous version of the application */,
  "new_version" TEXT /* New version of the application */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the update (foreign key to user_accounts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_updates_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
